title: Marcel's Green Soap Toilet Block Mint & Eucalyptus - Fragrant Toilet Freshener - With probiotics against unpleasant odours - 95% biodegradable - Recycled plastic (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

Marcel's Green Soap Mint & Eucalyptus Toilet Block is made with 99% natural ingredients and prevents unpleasant odours due to probiotics. So you can turn the smallest room in your house into the greenest!
This sustainable toilet rim block comes in packaging made of 100% recycled cardboard, including a holder made of 100% recycled plastic.
Marcel's Green Soap Toilet Block is 95% biodegradable, vegan and prevents limescale. Many toilet blocks contain substances that can be harmful for the environment or your health, but not this one!

Refresh your bathroom with the refreshing aromas of mint and eucalyptus. This toilet block infuses the air with a fresh, clean scent, transforming your bathroom into a calm, spa-like hideaway while effectively tackling unpleasant scents.
Marcel promises 3 things about his products: they smell wonderful, work fantastically and are also kind to the planet. That's what we call ‘Feel Good Cleaning’!
description: Ingredients Sodium Sulfate, Sodium Bicarbonate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Parfum, Sodium Chloride, Mentha Arvensis Leaf Oil, Bacillus Strains Limonene
